ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget period */,
  "budget_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget period */,
  "budget_spent" REAL /* Amount of budget spent so far */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given during the performance review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "goals_achieved" TEXT /* List of goals achieved during the review period */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas for improvement identified during the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session attended */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training occurred */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the training */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who conducted the session */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification obtained from the training */,
  "training_cost" REAL /* Cost of the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overtime_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overtime request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "hours_requested" INTEGER /* Number of hours requested for overtime */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the overtime request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Pay for the overtime hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_life_balance" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work-life balance entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "balance_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the employee's work-life balance */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the employee about their work-life balance */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the work-life balance survey was conducted */,
  "stress_level" INTEGER /* Stress level reported by the employee */,
  "support_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Satisfaction with support provided by the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_managers" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager assigned to the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started managing the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager stopped managing the department (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
